---
title: "Analyzing Baby Names and Flights"
author: "Alec Rogers"
format: html
execute:
    echo: false
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| label: setup

library(tidyverse)
library(DBI)
library(duckdb)
library(dbplyr)
```

```{r}
con_names <- DBI::dbConnect(
  duckdb::duckdb(),
  dbdir = "data/nameby_year.duckdb"
)
```

```{r}
#| cache: true

dbplyr_names <- tbl(con_names, "babynames")

x <- dbplyr_names |>
    filter(name %like% "Z%", year > 2000, n >= 10) |>
    mutate(length_class = if_else(str_length(name) <= 5, "Short", "Long")) |> 
    summarize(total = sum(n), .by = c(year, length_class)) |> 
    arrange(year) |>
    collect()
```


```{r}
x |>
  mutate(prop = total / sum(total), .by = year) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = prop, fill = length_class)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Short" = "#4CAF50", "Long" = "#FF9800"),
    labels = c(
      "Short" = "Short (≤5 characters)",
      "Long"  = "Long (>5 characters)"
    ),
    name = "Name Length"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of Z Names by Length Over Time",
    subtitle = "Short names have become more popular",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Proportion of Names", 
    caption = "Source: babynames dataset"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```
